heading: Step 3: Create vector search indexes
body:
Create a MongoDB Vector Search index for each collection. Use the following
index definition with the index name `vector_index`:

```json
{
  "fields": [
    {
      "numDimensions": 1536,
      "path": "embedding",
      "similarity": "cosine",
      "type": "vector"
    }
  ]
}
```

To learn how to create the index, see [Create a MongoDB Vector Search Index](avs-create-index).

> **Tip:** Both `text-embedding-ada-002` and `text-embedding-3-small`
> have 1536 dimensions, so the same index definition works for
> both collections.
